title: geranium virgineum
intro: Geranium virgineum, also known as the alpine geranium or mountain geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This perennial herb is native to Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, with health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune function. Geranium virgineum can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
